title: artanthe corylifolia
intro: Artanthe corylifolia, also known as Babchi or Phyllanthus, is a type of flowering plant commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Artanthe corylifolia include treating skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
